judgment.summary: A large, dividend-paying retailer with solid analyst backing and cash flow, but facing margin pressure and high valuation multiples.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates by 1.8%; next earnings date is 2026-05-21.
positives: Strong analyst consensus of 'strong_buy' with a mean target of $137.78.
Positive free cash flow of $10.55B TTM supports operations and dividends.
Return on equity at 21.8% indicates efficient use of shareholder equity.
Dividend yield of 0.8% offers a modest income stream.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 44.60 and forward P/E of 36.97 are high for a retailer.
Earnings growth YoY is negative at -19.0%, and quarterly earnings growth is -19.4%.
Operating margin of 4.6% and profit margin of 3.1% are relatively thin.
Total debt of $68.43B significantly outweighs total cash of $10.73B.

news.paragraph: Walmart Inc. is noted as being backed by Wall Street analysts and notable investor Louis Navellier, suggesting a degree of positive sentiment from key market participants. While no specific catalyst is mentioned, the endorsement from analysts and a significant investor could influence short-term price action. Traders should consider this backing in conjunction with the upcoming earnings report.

headlines.title: Walmart Inc. (WMT) Backed by Wall Street and Louis Navellier

examples.body: $SLS $NIO $WMT $TLRY dont sleep on his call, ripper incoming 🍻
$WMT heading to $100 . Anything above $130 wasn’t justifiable.
$WMT $TGT Who cares about food and groceries when we have AI and Quantum!!!! Repeat after me - Billionaires don't need HUMANS anymore, we have humanoid bot…
$WMT this is an example of when you play with emotions versus playing with facts.
